title: A Detour Through Lyon
description: Lyon in February is all soft edges — the city below fading into morning haze, rooftops stacked like a watercolor study. From the hills, it feels less like a metropolis and more like a memory of one.
coverAlt: Hilltop view of Lyon's hazy skyline with residential buildings in the foreground

images.alt: Panoramic view from a Lyon hilltop, city skyline dissolving into winter haze, figures sitting along a low wall
images.caption: Looking out over Lyon from the heights — the whole city wrapped in February haze
